name: Ralph Mercado
abstract: Ralph Mercado Jr. (September 29, 1941 – March 10, 2009) was an American businessman and music promoter.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: My son made a deal with Ralphie for two albums, three albums, which we did Arete and then Vortex, and then we did El Rumbero del Piano
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
